creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Leo Vandewoestijne from comment #3)
Option GNUTLS_CMAKE_BOOL valid if we switch from configure to cmake.
Otherwise use GNUTLS_CONFIGURE_WITH=gnutls.

--- net/libngtcp2/Makefile
+++ net/libngtcp2/Makefile
@@ -19,4 +19,10 @@
 INSTALL_TARGET=        install-strip
 USE_LDCONFIG=  yes

+OPTIONS_DEFINE=        GNUTLS
+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=       GNUTLS
+OPTIONS_SUB=           yes
+GNUTLS_LIB_DEPENDS=    libgnutls.so:security/gnutls
+GNUTLS_CONFIGURE_WITH= gnutls
+
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
--- net/libngtcp2/pkg-plist
+++ net/libngtcp2/pkg-plist
@@ -1,7 +1,14 @@
 include/ngtcp2/ngtcp2.h
+%%GNUTLS%%include/ngtcp2/ngtcp2_crypto.h
+%%GNUTLS%%include/ngtcp2/ngtcp2_crypto_gnutls.h
 include/ngtcp2/version.h
 lib/libngtcp2.a
 lib/libngtcp2.so
 lib/libngtcp2.so.16
 lib/libngtcp2.so.16.2.3
+%%GNUTLS%%lib/libngtcp2_crypto_gnutls.a
+%%GNUTLS%%lib/libngtcp2_crypto_gnutls.so
+%%GNUTLS%%lib/libngtcp2_crypto_gnutls.so.8
+%%GNUTLS%%lib/libngtcp2_crypto_gnutls.so.8.1.1
 libdata/pkgconfig/libngtcp2.pc
+%%GNUTLS%%libdata/pkgconfig/libngtcp2_crypto_gnutls.pc
